title: Fullbright Toggle
description: Press a key to toggle the brightness in-game to maximum and get night vision
body: FullBright Toggle is a client-side mod that lets players instantly set their brightness to maximum with a single key press. The default key is G, though this can be customised in the pause menu. Be mindful of server rules when using this mod—if you're unsure whether it's allowed, check with the server first.
